customer_anxiety_profile: No anxiety signals observed. Michael is cooperative and pre-warmed — he submitted his bills proactively and confirmed the appointment without hesitation.
exact_promises_rep_made: Appointment set for tomorrow at 3:00 PM by phone
Closer will go over the design and answer any questions or concerns
Reminder text will be sent beforehand with appointment details

closer_should_know: Michael was told to have access to his email — not explicitly told to be at a computer. Confirm at the top of the call that he is at a desktop or laptop where he can view the design document; do not assume he is screen-ready. The one-hour block was not stated, so Michael's time expectation for the call is unknown — set it early.
